---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---
[Please click here to view/download my resume](CerenDolekResume.pdf)

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2020 - ongoing

# Work Experience

- Anadolu Sigorta, Data Analysis Long Term Internship, 01.12.2025 - ongoing 
## Employements

## Internships

- Kucukpazarli, Production Planning Intern, 2023

- Turkcell, Network Purchase Intern, 2025

- Anadolu Sigorta, Business Analysis Intern, 2025

# Projects

Graduation Project - Aselsan

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python

# Hobbies

Tango, theatre, photography, piano
